findings.section: §02 step 03 + §04 Patterns Evals chip + §05 Evals approach
findings.issue: Claim '30+ VLM checks' / 'VLM scores 30+ checks per scene' is asserted three times on the page but does NOT trace to the social-pilot .ai source. The '30+' figure exists in the Trend-to-Design Agent source (AI_Design_Agent_Note_v1.pdf) but was carried over to this page without verification. The social-pilot frame-grading docs reference VLM auto-grade but no specific check count.
findings.fix: Either (a) source the exact check count from the SocialPilot codebase (look at backend/src/services/grading/) and update the YAML with the verified number; OR (b) soften to 'VLM scores quality checks · auto-retry on fail' (drop the '30+' specificity). Edit data/agents/generative-media.yaml lines 218 (workflow_steps[2].detail), 251 (patterns Evals.usage), 259 (evals.approach) and rebuild.

findings.section: §01 job.what_it_does + §02 step 03 + §03 underlying data row 4 + SVG input card 'Product catalogue + AI Photoshoot stills'
findings.issue: AI Photoshoot input chain is asserted as current state on 4 surfaces. The social-pilot source confirms a generic 'ReferenceProcessor' that handles 'product and avatar reference images' (system-overview.md, video-generation.md), but does NOT name AI Photoshoot specifically. Per the user's note this is a planned dependency — the YAML's in_flight field captures it correctly (line 281 'AI Photoshoot output as a first-class scene reference · pipeline wiring to consume Trends Reboot delivery feed'), but the rendered page reads it as already-wired.
findings.fix: Soften the four current-state claims to indicate planning. Examples: §01 → 'using Vertex AI Imagen, with AI Photoshoot output planned as scene reference'. §02 step 03 → 'Reference images include product catalogue stills (AI Photoshoot integration on the roadmap)'. §03 underlying data row 4 → mark as 'Planned' or 'Roadmap'. SVG input card 3 → 'Product catalogue · AI Photoshoot integration in flight'.

findings.issue: Phrase 'will move to the Reliance pilot when it lands' is forward-looking without a date. Per tone-of-voice §3 last bullet: 'Forward-looking phases without dates. … If a section makes time-promises, every promise carries a date or a named DRI. Otherwise cut the section.' The Building state is honest, but the 'when it lands' phrasing is the kind of soft promise the rule targets.
findings.fix: Either (a) drop the 'will move to the Reliance pilot when it lands' clause and let the Building pill carry the not-yet-deployed signal, OR (b) add a date or named DRI: 'Reliance pilot scoping in progress — primary brand and KPI baselines TBD by <date>'.

findings.issue: Claim '4-10 s per clip' for Veo or Kling animation conflates two providers' duration ranges. Source video-generation-workflow.md says Veo supports '4, 6, or 8 second durations' and Kling supports '5 or 10 seconds'. The 4-10 union is technically defensible but loses provider-specific precision an Apex reader might want.
findings.fix: Two acceptable rewrites: (a) 'Veo 4-8 s · Kling 5-10 s per clip' — keeps both providers explicit; (b) drop the duration entirely from the step strip and let the step be 'first-last-frame animation'. Edit data/agents/generative-media.yaml line 219.

findings.issue: Two in_flight entries carry `date: 'TBD'` (Reliance pilot scoping + AI Photoshoot pipeline wiring). Per agents-spec D23 the §07 Status section is dropped from the rendered page, so these are developer-facing metadata only — but they undermine the canonical-source rule: the YAML is the single source of truth, and TBD dates flag undated commitments. NOT visible to Apex (rendering correctly suppressed) but WORTH noting for the next sweep.
findings.fix: Acceptable as-is for this PR (not rendered). When the Reliance pilot landing date and AI Photoshoot integration date are known, replace 'TBD' with the actual dates so the YAML stays canonical. No render-side fix needed today.

findings.issue: The agent template (tools/build_agents.py LOCAL_STYLES) carries 21+ ad-hoc hex literals + multiple off-scale font sizes (10.5px, 11.5px, 12.5px, 13.5px, 17px, 22px). Pre-existing issue across all 8 agent pages — flagged in the AI Photoshoot audit (M4). Not a new finding for this page.
findings.fix: Out of scope for this PR — template-wide refactor warrants its own change covering all 8 catalog pages. See AI Photoshoot audit (docs/audits/ai-photoshoot-agent-audit-2026-05-03.json M4) for the full prescription.

findings.issue: Phrase 'typically 3-6 weeks per format per brand, with talent and post costs that scale linearly with volume' is the page author's industry characterization, not a sourced number. Acceptable as a register-typical pain framing (matches AI Photoshoot's '4-6 weeks' framing for lingerie shoots which IS sourced) but not strictly traceable.
findings.fix: Acceptable as-is — matches the conventional pain-framing approach used on AI Photoshoot (where '4-6 weeks lingerie turnaround' is source-grounded). If an Apex reviewer flags it, replace with a citable industry stat or soften to 'multi-week'.

strengths: Tone-of-voice is exemplary — across ~700 lines of new copy, ZERO banned vocabulary (no 'unlocks/empowers/enables/leverages/seamless/transformative/world-class/etc.'), ZERO 'we/our/us', ZERO exclamation marks, ZERO §Sources block, ZERO internal source-document references in body copy. The renderer-level 'we' fix on §05 heading + 'unlocks' → 'delivers' fix on §03 column header carries through cleanly.

Numbers cross-check: 6 sub-agents (verified against agents.md §Backend AI Agents · Script Writer/Trend Scout/Brand Analyzer/Ralph Ideation/Performance/Brief Suggestion = 6), 6 pipeline stages (verified against system-overview.md data-flow examples), 9 services (verified by counting the named provider list in the Provider fabric stat tile context · Claude/OpenAI/Gemini/Vertex Imagen/fal.ai/Veo/Kling/Runway/Pixelbin = 9), 68% test coverage (verified in agents.md §Test Architecture), 15-minute JWT (verified in system-overview.md).

Honesty register handles the no-Reliance-deployment-yet state correctly: Building pill matches actual state, primary platform anchor pill correctly omitted from hero per user direction, no overclaim of Reliance pilot, agents-x-platforms.yaml deployments[] empty so injector renders no §03 surfacing on any platform page.

Workflow SVG matches the AI Photoshoot precedent (3-zone layout · inputs left · workflow centre with Storyboard Review gate as human-in-loop checkpoint · outputs right · Performance loop drawn explicitly as feedback to the brief library). Hidden on mobile via the @media (max-width: 768px) rule we added in the AI Photoshoot audit fix — verified at 500px viewport (display:none, body_overflow:false).

Section labels contiguous 01-06 (no spec gaps), all required chrome present (nav · footer · auth.js · style.css · Tailwind · present.css · present.js wiring), cross-page consistency strong (agents/ index correctly renders 4th sell-band card with matching status pills + sub-title).
